idx_alert_rules_account.name: idx_alert_rules_account
idx_alert_rules_account.where: "alert_rules"."scope" = 'account' AND "alert_rules"."is_active" = true AND "alert_rules"."account_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_alert_rules_recurring.name: idx_alert_rules_recurring
idx_alert_rules_recurring.where: "alert_rules"."scope" = 'recurring' AND "alert_rules"."is_active" = true AND "alert_rules"."recurring_transaction_id" IS NOT NULL

chk_split_has_person.name: chk_split_has_person
chk_split_has_person.value: "transaction_splits"."user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "transaction_splits"."contact_name" IS NOT NULL

chk_transaction_notify_target.name: chk_transaction_notify_target
